mappings.reason: Disabling dormant accounts after inactivity directly implements the 'disabled when not in use' requirement for vendor accounts, though it is reactive rather than proactive time-binding.

Establishing and following an access revocation process to disable accounts upon termination or role change satisfies the 'disabled when not in use' requirement when the vendor access time period ends.
Conducting audit log reviews to detect anomalies directly implements the 'monitored while in use' requirement for vendor authentication sessions.
